title: artemisia tilesii subsp. hultenii
intro: Artemisia tilesii subsp. hultenii, also known as Hulten's wormwood or Russian wormwood, is a subspecies of the Artemisia tilesii plant, a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Artemisia tilesii subsp. hultenii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and nausea, and provide relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and colds, as well as to promote overall well-being and immune system function.
